prestazioni: Engine: ER1/ER2 (CVCC-II 1.2L SOHC PGM-FI) with forged internals including JUN Auto forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft for 12,000 RPM reliability. Turbocharger upgraded to a Garrett GT2560R with a custom 0.63 A/R turbine housing and 60mm compressor wheel, paired with a Tial MV-R 38mm external wastegate for 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) boost pressure.

Fuel System: Full Aeromotive A1000 fuel pump with -8AN lines, Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min), and a custom PGM-FI ECU reflash via Hondata S300 with individual cylinder trims, optimized for E85 fuel (85% ethanol blend) and a custom intake manifold with velocity stacks for improved airflow.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (1.5-way) in the stock 5-speed transmission, reinforced with a PPG straight-cut dog engagement gearset (1st-4th gears). Clutch upgraded to a Spec Stage 4+ twin-disc setup with a billet flywheel, and the driveshaft replaced with a custom 3.5-inch aluminum unit from Driveshaft Shop to handle 350+ HP.

Suspension: Tein Mono Flex coilovers with 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs, adjustable camber plates, and spherical bearing pillowball top mounts. Polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension) replace all factory rubber, and the rear torsion beam is reinforced with a custom tubular subframe brace from Buddy Club.

Braking: Endless 6-pot front calipers with 330mm two-piece rotors (floating, slotted) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with a custom brake master cylinder from Wilwood. Rear brakes upgraded to Endless 4-pot calipers with 280mm rotors and Ferodo DS1.11 pads, with stainless steel braided lines throughout.
estetica: Body Kit: Full Mugen City Turbo II replica aero kit (1980s JDM-spec), including the iconic 'Bullbar' front bumper, side skirts, and rear ducktail spoiler, all fiberglass with a custom carbon fiber weave finish. Front fenders widened 20mm per side to accommodate 15x8 +25 Work Meister S1 3P wheels with 185/55R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires.

Interior: Full Bride Euro II reclining bucket seats (fixed-back) with Takata 4-point harnesses, mounted on custom aluminum seat rails. Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm) with a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom gauge pod housing Defi Advance BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, water temp, and fuel pressure). Shift knob replaced with a Mugen aluminum short shifter with a weighted brass knob.

Lighting: Full Hella H4 headlight conversion with Cibie Oscar projectors and custom HID bi-xenon bulbs (4300K), paired with JDM-spec yellow fog lights (Stanley). Rear lights replaced with clear-lens LED units from Depo Racing, and the license plate recess filled with a carbon fiber panel for a clean look.

Details: Custom 'Turbo II' badges in gold anodized aluminum (replicating the original JDM script) on the rear hatch and front fenders. Engine bay detailed with a custom aluminum strut brace (painted Honda Racing White), gold anodized turbo heat shield, and braided stainless steel oil lines with AN fittings. The entire car is wrapped in 3M 1080 Gloss Sunflower Yellow with a matte black roof and mirror caps.
